kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": { "width": 1280, "height": 720 } }

kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.gother.online/en-us

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=signin-and-register-big-button at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=signin-and-register-big-button'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click email or mobile no. button
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=button:has-text("Email or Mobile No.") at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button:has-text("Email or Mobile No.")'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'sutida.n@doppiotech.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
